questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 雲端中託管一個三層 Web 應用程式。多可用區 Amazon RDS for MySQL 伺服器構成資料庫層 Amazon ElastiCache 構成快取層。該公司需要一種快取策略，當客戶將項目新增至資料庫時，該策略可以新增或更新快取中的資料。快取中的資料必須始終與資料庫中的資料相符。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts a three-tier web application in the AWS Cloud. A Multi-AZAmazon RDS for MySQL server forms the database layer Amazon ElastiCache forms the cache layer. The company wants a caching strategy that adds or updates data in the cache when a customer adds an item to the database. The data in the cache must always match the data in the database. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 實作延遲載入快取策略
A.en: Implement the lazy loading caching strategy

B.zh: 實作直寫式快取策略
B.en: Implement the write-through caching strategy

C.zh: 實作新增TTL快取策略
C.en: Implement the adding TTL caching strategy

D.zh: 實作 AWS AppConfig 快取策略
D.en: Implement the AWS AppConfig caching strategy

A.zh: 錯誤。延遲載入是一種快取策略，僅在請求時才將資料從資料庫載入到快取中。這種策略無法保證快取和資料庫資料的一致性，因為資料更新後並不會自動更新到快取中。
A.en: Incorrect. Lazy loading is a caching strategy in which data is loaded from the database into the cache only when it is requested. This strategy cannot ensure the consistency of the cache and database data because the data is not automatically updated in the cache after it is updated.

B.zh: 正確。直寫是一種快取策略，它在將資料寫入資料庫的同時將資料寫入快取。此策略確保快取與資料庫資料的一致性，因為每次更新都會同步到快取。這個選項是正確的。
B.en: Correct. Write-through is a caching strategy that writes data to the cache at the same time as it is written to the database. This strategy ensures cache consistency with database data because every update is synchronized to the cache. This option is correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。新增TTL是設定快取過期時間的策略。資料在快取中保存一段時間後會自動過期。雖然可以減少快取中過期資料的數量，但是無法保證快取和資料庫資料的一致性。
C.en: Incorrect. Adding TTL is a strategy for setting cache expiration time. Data will automatically expire after being stored in the cache for a period of time. Although you can reduce the amount of expired data in the cache, you cannot ensure the consistency of the cache and database data.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS AppConfig 主要用於管理應用程式配置，並非專門用於快取資料。此選項與題目要求無關，因此不正確。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS AppConfig is primarily used to manage application configuration and is not specifically used to cache data. This option has nothing to do with the question requirements and is therefore incorrect.

answer_text.zh: B. 實作直寫式快取策略
answer_text.en: B. Implement the write-through caching strategy

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：直寫是一種快取策略，它在將資料寫入資料庫的同時將資料寫入快取。此策略確保快取與資料庫資料的一致性，因為每次更新都會同步到快取。這個選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Write-through is a caching strategy that writes data to the cache at the same time as it is written to the database. This strategy ensures cache consistency with database data because every update is synchronized to the cache. This option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望將 100 GB 歷史資料從本地位置遷移到 Amazon S3 儲存桶。該公司擁有每秒 100 兆位元 (Mbps) 的內部網路連線。該公司需要對傳輸到 S3 儲存桶的資料進行加密。該公司將把新資料直接儲存在Amazon S3中。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to migrate 100 GB of historical data from an on-premises location to an Amazon S3 bucket. The company has a 100 megabits per second (Mbps) internet connection on premises. The company needs to encrypt the data in transit to the S3 bucket. The company will store new data directly in Amazon S3. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用 AWS CLI 中的 s3 同步指令將資料直接移至 S3 儲存桶
A.en: Use the s3 sync command in the AWS CLI to move the data directly to an S3 bucket

B.zh: 使用 AWS DataSync 將資料從本機位置遷移到 S3 儲存桶
B.en: Use AWS DataSync to migrate the data from the on-premises location to an S3 bucket

C.zh: 使用 AWS Snowball 將資料移至 S3 儲存桶
C.en: Use AWS Snowball to move the data to an S3 bucket

D.zh: 設定從本機位置到 AWS 的 IPsec VPN。使用 AWS CLI 中的 s3 cp 指令將資料直接移至 S3 儲存桶
D.en: Set up an IPsec VPN from the on-premises location to AWS. Use the s3 cp command in the AWS CLI to move the data directly to an S3 bucket

A.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：s3sync指令可以直接將資料從本地同步到S3，但取決於本地網路連線的穩定性和速度。加密分析：AWS CLI確認使用HTTPS協定傳輸數據，滿足加密傳輸的要求。操作簡單：操作雖然簡單，但對於100GB的資料量，使用CLI可能會受到網路頻寬的限制，遷移時間也相對較短。這個選項是正確的，但不是最優解。
A.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: The s3 sync command can directly synchronize data from local to S3, but it depends on the stability and speed of the local network connection. Encryption analysis: AWS CLI confirms that the HTTPS protocol is used to transmit data, which meets the requirements for encrypted transmission. Simplified operation: Although the operation is simple, for a data volume of 100 GB, using the CLI may be limited by network bandwidth and the migration time is relatively short. This option is correct, but not the optimal solution.

B.zh: 正確。效能分析：AWS DataSync 是專為遷移資料而設計的服務，支援高效率的資料傳輸。加密分析：DataSync自動對資料傳輸進行加密，滿足加密要求。操作簡化：DataSync 提供自動化功能，降低手動操作的複雜度。這個選項是正確的，也是最優解。
B.en: Correct. Performance analysis: AWS DataSync is a service specifically designed to migrate data and supports efficient data transfer. Encryption analysis: DataSync automatically encrypts data transmission to meet encryption requirements. Operational simplification: DataSync provides automation capabilities that reduce the complexity of manual operations. This option is correct and the optimal solution.

C.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：AWS Snowball適合大規模資料遷移，但100GB的資料量較小，Snowball不適合。加密分析：Snowball 裝置支援資料加密，但需要額外的硬體操作。操作簡單：使用Snowball需申請設備、設定和恢復設備，操作複雜度較高。
C.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: AWS Snowball is suitable for large-scale data migration, but the data volume of 100 GB is small, so Snowball is not suitable. Encryption analysis: Snowball devices support data encryption, but require additional hardware operation. Simplified operation: Using Snowball requires applying for equipment, configuring and restoring equipment, and the operation complexity is relatively high.

D.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：設定IPsec VPN可以實現加密傳輸，但需要額外的網路配置。加密分析：VPN提供加密傳輸，但AWS CLI本身已經支援加密傳輸，使得VPN設定變得多餘。營運簡化：設定VPN增加了營運複雜性，不符合「最小營運開銷」的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Setting up IPsec VPN can achieve encrypted transmission, but requires additional network configuration. Encryption analysis: VPN provides encrypted transmission, but AWS CLI itself already supports encrypted transmission, making VPN settings redundant. Operational simplification: Setting up a VPN increases operational complexity and does not meet the requirement of “minimum operational overhead”.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS DataSync 將資料從本機位置遷移到 S3 儲存桶
answer_text.en: B. Use AWS DataSync to migrate the data from the on-premises location to an S3 bucket

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (63%)； A (38%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能分析：AWS DataSync 是專為遷移資料而設計的服務，支援高效率的資料傳輸。加密分析：DataSync自動對資料傳輸進行加密，滿足加密要求。操作簡化：DataSync 提供自動化功能，降低手動操作的複雜度。這個選項是正確的，也是最優解。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (63%); A (38%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance analysis: AWS DataSync is a service specifically designed to migrate data and supports efficient data transfer. Encryption analysis: DataSync automatically encrypts data transmission to meet encryption requirements. Operational simplification: DataSync provides automation capabilities that reduce the complexity of manual operations. This option is correct and the optimal solution.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司對 Windows 作業進行了容器化，該作業在 Windows 容器下的 .NET 6 Framework 上運行。該公司希望在 AWS 雲端中運行此作業。該作業每 10 分鐘運行一次。作業的運行時間在 1 分鐘到 3 分鐘之間變化。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company containerized a Windows job that runs on .NET 6 Framework under a Windows container. The company wants to run this job in the AWS Cloud. The job runs every 10 minutes. The job’s runtime varies between 1 minute and 3 minutes. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 以作業為基礎的容器映像建立 AWS Lambda 函數。配置 Amazon EventBridge 以每 10 分鐘呼叫函數。
A.en: Create an AWS Lambda function based on the container image of the job. Configure Amazon EventBridge to invoke the function every 10 minutes.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Batch 建立使用 AWS Fargate 資源的作業。將作業計劃配置為每 10 分鐘運行一次。
B.en: Use AWS Batch to create a job that uses AWS Fargate resources. Configure the job scheduling to run every 10 minutes.

C.zh: 在 AWS Fargate 上使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 執行作業。根據作業的容器鏡像建立排程任務，每10分鐘執行一次。
C.en: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate to run the job. Create a scheduled task based on the container image of the job to run every 10 minutes.

D.zh: 在 AWS Fargate 上使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 執行作業。根據作業的容器鏡像建立獨立任務。使用 Windows 任務排程器每 10 分鐘執行一次作業。
D.en: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate to run the job. Create a standalone task based on the container image of the job. Use Windows task scheduler to run the job every 10 minutes.

A.zh: 錯誤。原因：雖然 AWS Lambda 支援基於容器映像的功能，但 AWS Lambda 目前不支援執行 Windows 容器。該選項不符合題目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Cause: Although AWS Lambda supports functions based on container images, AWS Lambda does not currently support running Windows containers. This option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。原因：AWS Batch適合批次處理任務，通常用於處理大規模任務或需要佇列管理的場景。對於單一規劃任務，使用 AWS Batch 會過於複雜且成本高昂。
B.en: Incorrect. Reason: AWS Batch is suitable for batch processing tasks, and is usually used to handle large-scale tasks or scenarios that require queue management. For a single scheduled task, using AWS Batch will be too complex and costly.

C.zh: 正確。原因：Amazon ECS 支援運行 Windows 容器，並且可以使用 Fargate 以無伺服器方式運作。使用ECS的定時任務功能，您可以輕鬆滿足每10分鐘運行一次的需求，同時保持較低的成本和管理瘋狂的訂單。
C.en: Correct. Reason: Amazon ECS supports running Windows containers and can be run serverless with Fargate. Using the scheduled task function of ECS, you can easily meet the requirement of running every 10 minutes while keeping costs low and managing crazy orders.

D.zh: 錯誤。原因：此選項提到使用 Windows 任務排程器來排程任務，但這與 AWS 雲端的本機服務無關。使用ECS的定時任務功能已經可以滿足需求了，不需要再使用Windows任務排程程式了。
D.en: Incorrect. Cause: This option mentions using the Windows Task Scheduler to schedule tasks, but this has nothing to do with the AWS cloud's native services. Using the scheduled task function of ECS can already meet the needs, and there is no need to use the Windows task scheduler.

answer_text.zh: C. 在 AWS Fargate 上使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 執行作業。根據作業的容器鏡像建立排程任務，每10分鐘執行一次。
answer_text.en: C. Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate to run the job. Create a scheduled task based on the container image of the job to run every 10 minutes.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (51%)； B (29%)； A (20%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：原因：Amazon ECS 支援運行 Windows 容器，並且可以使用 Fargate 以無伺服器方式運作。使用ECS的定時任務功能，您可以輕鬆滿足每10分鐘運行一次的需求，同時保持較低的成本和管理瘋狂的訂單。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (51%); B (29%); A (20%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Reason: Amazon ECS supports running Windows containers and can be run serverless with Fargate. Using the scheduled task function of ECS, you can easily meet the requirement of running every 10 minutes while keeping costs low and managing crazy orders.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望從許多獨立的 AWS 帳戶遷移到整合的多帳戶架構。該公司計劃為不同的業務部門創建許多新的AWS帳戶。該公司需要使用集中式企業目錄服務來驗證對這些 AWS 帳戶的存取權。解決方案架構師應該推薦哪種操作組合來滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company wants to move from many standalone AWS accounts to a consolidated, multi-account architecture. The company plans to create many new AWS accounts for different business units. The company needs to authenticate access to these AWS accounts by using a centralized corporate directory service. Which combination of actions should a solutions architect recommend to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 在 AWS Organizations 中建立一個新組織並啟用所有功能。在組織中建立新的 AWS 帳戶。
A.en: Create a new organization in AWS Organizations with all features turned on. Create the new AWS accounts in the organization.

B.zh: 設定 Amazon Cognito 身份池。配置 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) 以接受 Amazon Cognito 驗證。
B.en: Set up an Amazon Cognito identity pool. Configure AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to accept Amazon Cognito authentication.

C.zh: 設定服務控制政策 (SCP) 來管理 AWS 帳戶。將 AWS IAM Identity Center（AW​​S Single Sign-On）新增至 AWS Directory Service。
C.en: Configure a service control policy (SCP) to manage the AWS accounts. Add AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) to AWS Directory Service.

D.zh: 在 AWS Organizations 中建立一個新組織。配置組織的身份驗證機制以直接使用 AWS Directory Service。
D.en: Create a new organization in AWS Organizations. Configure the organization's authentication mechanism to use AWS Directory Service directly.

E.zh: 在組織中設定 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)。配置 IAM Identity Center，並將其與公司的企業目錄服務整合。
E.en: Set up AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) in the organization. Configure IAM Identity Center, and integrate it with the company's corporate directory service.

A.zh: 正確。分析：正確。 AWS Organizations 可集中管理多個 AWS 帳戶，所有功能啟用後即可使用服務控制政策 (SCP) 等進階功能。在組織中建立新帳戶是實施多帳戶架構的關鍵步驟。
A.en: Correct. Analysis: Correct. AWS Organizations allows centralized management of multiple AWS accounts, and advanced features such as Service Control Policies (SCP) can be used after all features are enabled. Creating new accounts in an organization is a critical step in implementing a multi-account architecture.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：錯誤。 Amazon Cognito 主要用於管理應用程式使用者身份，而不是集中管理對 AWS 帳戶的存取。 AWS IAM Identity Center 不會直接依賴 Amazon Cognito 進行驗證。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Error. Amazon Cognito is primarily used to manage application user identities, rather than centrally managing access to AWS accounts. AWS IAM Identity Center does not rely directly on Amazon Cognito for authentication.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：錯誤。儘管 SCP 可以管理帳戶權限，但不建議將 AWS IAM Identity Center 與 AWS Directory Service 直接整合。 IAM Identity Center 通常與 Active Directory 等企業目錄服務整合。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Error. Although SCP can manage account permissions, direct integration of AWS IAM Identity Center with AWS Directory Service is not recommended. IAM Identity Center typically integrates with enterprise directory services such as Active Directory.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：錯誤。 AWS Organizations 本身不支援直接使用 AWS Directory Service 作為驗證機制。身份驗證通常透過 IAM Identity Center 與企業目錄服務整合來實現。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Error. AWS Organizations itself does not support direct use of AWS Directory Service as an authentication mechanism. Authentication is typically achieved through IAM Identity Center integration with enterprise directory services.

E.zh: 正確。分析：正確。 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) 是用於集中管理使用者對多個 AWS 帳戶的存取權的建議解決方案。可與企業目錄服務（如Active Directory）集成，實現統一的身份認證。
E.en: Correct. Analysis: Correct. AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) is the recommended solution for centrally managing user access to multiple AWS accounts. It can be integrated with enterprise directory services (such as Active Directory) to achieve unified identity authentication.

answer_text.zh: A. 在 AWS Organizations 中建立一個新組織並啟用所有功能。在組織中建立新的 AWS 帳戶。；E. 在組織中設定 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On)。配置 IAM Identity Center，並將其與公司的企業目錄服務整合。
answer_text.en: A. Create a new organization in AWS Organizations with all features turned on. Create the new AWS accounts in the organization.; E. Set up AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) in the organization. Configure IAM Identity Center, and integrate it with the company's corporate directory service.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AE (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：正確。 AWS Organizations 可集中管理多個 AWS 帳戶，所有功能啟用後即可使用服務控制政策 (SCP) 等進階功能。在組織中建立新帳戶是實施多帳戶架構的關鍵步驟。；分析：正確。 AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) 是用於集中管理使用者對多個 AWS 帳戶的存取權的建議解決方案。可與企業目錄服務（如Active Directory）集成，實現統一的身份認證。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Correct. AWS Organizations allows centralized management of multiple AWS accounts, and advanced features such as Service Control Policies (SCP) can be used after all features are enabled. Creating new accounts in an organization is a critical step in implementing a multi-account architecture.; Analysis: Correct. AWS IAM Identity Center (AWS Single Sign-On) is the recommended solution for centrally managing user access to multiple AWS accounts. It can be integrated with enterprise directory services (such as Active Directory) to achieve unified identity authentication.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在尋找一種解決方案，可以將舊新聞片段的視訊檔案儲存在 AWS 中。公司需要最大限度地降低成本，並且很少需要恢復這些文件。當需要這些文件時，它們必須在最多五分鐘內可用。最具成本效益的解決方案是什麼？
question_text.en: A company is looking for a solution that can store video archives in AWS from old news footage. The company needs to minimize costs and will rarely need to restore these files. When the files are needed, they must be available in a maximum of five minutes. What is the MOST cost-effective solution?

A.zh: 將視訊檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 Glacier 中並使用加急檢索。
A.en: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 Glacier and use Expedited retrievals.

B.zh: 將視訊檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 Glacier 中並使用標準檢索。
B.en: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 Glacier and use Standard retrievals.

C.zh: 將視訊檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 標準-不頻繁存取 (S3 標準-IA) 中。
C.en: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA).

D.zh: 將影片檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) 中。
D.en: Store the video archives in Amazon S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA).

A.zh: 正確。Amazon S3 Glacier 是一種專為長期儲存而設計的低成本儲存解決方案，適合儲存不常存取的資料。加急檢索可以在1-5分鐘內檢索到數據，滿足問題中「最多五分鐘內可用」的要求。雖然加急檢索的成本較高，但由於檢索頻率較低，整體成本仍是最優的。
A.en: Correct. Amazon S3 Glacier is a low-cost storage solution designed for long-term storage and is suitable for storing infrequently accessed data. Expedited retrievals can retrieve data within 1-5 minutes, meeting the requirement of "must be available within a maximum of five minutes" in the question. Although the cost of Expedited retrievals is higher, the overall cost is still optimal due to the low retrieval frequency.

B.zh: 錯誤。標準檢索的檢索時間為3-5小時，不符合問題中「最多五分鐘內可用」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. The retrieval time of Standard retrievals is 3-5 hours, which does not meet the requirement of "must be available within a maximum of five minutes" in the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。S3 Standard-IA 適用於需要更高可用性和更低存取延遲的數據，但其儲存成本高於 S3 Glacier，並不是最具成本效益的選擇。另外，問題中明確指出資料「很少需要恢復」，S3 Standard-IA不適合這種存取模式。
C.en: Incorrect. S3 Standard-IA is suitable for data that requires higher availability and lower access latency, but its storage cost is higher than S3 Glacier and is not the most cost-effective choice. In addition, the question clearly states that data "rarely needs to be restored" and S3 Standard-IA is not suitable for this access mode.

D.zh: 錯誤。S3 One Zone-IA 的儲存成本低於 S3 Standard-IA，但仍高於 S3 Glacier。另外，S3 One Zone-IA旨在儲存不需要跨多個可用區冗餘的數據，適合可用性要求不高的場景，但問題中並沒有說明這項要求。
D.en: Incorrect. The storage cost of S3 One Zone-IA is lower than S3 Standard-IA, but still higher than S3 Glacier. In addition, S3 One Zone-IA is designed to store data that does not require redundancy across multiple availability zones, and is suitable for scenarios with low availability requirements, but this requirement is not stated in the question.

answer_text.zh: A. 將視訊檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 Glacier 中並使用加急檢索。
answer_text.en: A. Store the video archives in Amazon S3 Glacier and use Expedited retrievals.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (97%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon S3 Glacier 是一種專為長期儲存而設計的低成本儲存解決方案，適合儲存不常存取的資料。加急檢索可以在1-5分鐘內檢索到數據，滿足問題中「最多五分鐘內可用」的要求。雖然加急檢索的成本較高，但由於檢索頻率較低，整體成本仍是最優的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (97%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon S3 Glacier is a low-cost storage solution designed for long-term storage and is suitable for storing infrequently accessed data. Expedited retrievals can retrieve data within 1-5 minutes, meeting the requirement of "must be available within a maximum of five minutes" in the question. Although the cost of Expedited retrievals is higher, the overall cost is still optimal due to the low retrieval frequency.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 AWS 上建立三層應用程式。表示層將服務於靜態網站。邏輯層是容器化應用程式。該應用程式將資料儲存在關聯式資料庫中。該公司希望簡化部署並降低營運成本。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is building a three-tier application on AWS. The presentation tier will serve a static website The logic tier is a containerized application. This application will store data in a relational database. The company wants to simplify deployment and to reduce operational costs. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 託管靜態內容。將 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 與 AWS Fargate 結合使用以獲得運算能力。使用託管 Amazon RDS 叢集作為資料庫。
A.en: Use Amazon S3 to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with AWS Fargate for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon CloudFront 來託管靜態內容。將 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 與 Amazon EC2 結合使用以獲得運算能力。使用託管 Amazon RDS 叢集作為資料庫。
B.en: Use Amazon CloudFront to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with Amazon EC2 for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 託管靜態內容。將 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 與 AWS Fargate 結合使用以獲得運算能力。使用託管 Amazon RDS 叢集作為資料庫。
C.en: Use Amazon S3 to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with AWS Fargate for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon EC2 預留執行個體託管靜態內容。將 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 與 Amazon EC2 結合使用以獲得運算能力。使用託管 Amazon RDS 叢集作為資料庫。
D.en: Use Amazon EC2 Reserved Instances to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) with Amazon EC2 for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon S3 是託管靜態網站內容的最佳選擇，具有高可用性和低成本。正確：Amazon ECS 和 AWS Fargate 的組合可以簡化容器化應用程式的部署，無需管理底層 EC2 執行個體並降低營運成本。正確：Amazon RDS 是託管關聯式資料庫的最佳選擇，提供自動化管理功能以進一步簡化操作。
A.en: Correct. Amazon S3 is the best choice for hosting static website content, with high availability and low cost. Correct: The combination of Amazon ECS and AWS Fargate can simplify the deployment of containerized applications, eliminating the need to manage underlying EC2 instances and reducing operating costs. Correct: Amazon RDS is the best choice for hosting relational databases, providing automated management capabilities to further simplify operations.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon CloudFront 是內容傳遞網路 (CDN)，無法直接託管靜態內容。需要與Amazon S3結合才能實現託管功能。錯誤：使用Amazon ECS和Amazon EC2需要管理底層實例，這增加了操作複雜性，不符合簡化部署的要求。正確：Amazon RDS 是託管關係型資料庫的正確選擇。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon CloudFront is a content delivery network (CDN) and cannot directly host static content. It needs to be combined with Amazon S3 to realize the hosting function. Error: Using Amazon ECS and Amazon EC2 requires management of underlying instances, which increases operational complexity and does not meet the requirements for simplified deployment. Correct: Amazon RDS is the right choice for hosting relational databases.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 是託管靜態網站內容的最佳選擇。錯誤：雖然 Amazon EKS 支援 AWS Fargate，但 EKS 比 ECS 更複雜，不符合簡化部署的要求。正確：Amazon RDS 是託管關係型資料庫的正確選擇。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3 is the best choice for hosting static website content. Error: Although Amazon EKS supports AWS Fargate, EKS is more complex than ECS and does not meet the requirements for simplified deployment. Correct: Amazon RDS is the right choice for hosting relational databases.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon EC2 預留執行個體來託管靜態內容既昂貴又複雜，而且不是最佳實務。錯誤：使用 Amazon EKS 和 Amazon EC2 會增加管理複雜性，且不符合簡化部署的要求。正確：Amazon RDS 是託管關係型資料庫的正確選擇。
D.en: Incorrect. Using Amazon EC2 Reserved Instances to host static content is expensive and complex, and is not a best practice. Error: Using Amazon EKS and Amazon EC2 increases management complexity and does not meet the requirements for simplified deployment. Correct: Amazon RDS is the right choice for hosting relational databases.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 Amazon S3 託管靜態內容。將 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 與 AWS Fargate 結合使用以獲得運算能力。使用託管 Amazon RDS 叢集作為資料庫。
answer_text.en: A. Use Amazon S3 to host static content. Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with AWS Fargate for compute power. Use a managed Amazon RDS cluster for the database.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon S3 是託管靜態網站內容的最佳選擇，具有高可用性和低成本。正確：Amazon ECS 和 AWS Fargate 的組合可以簡化容器化應用程式的部署，無需管理底層 EC2 執行個體並降低營運成本。正確：Amazon RDS 是託管關聯式資料庫的最佳選擇，提供自動化管理功能以進一步簡化操作。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon S3 is the best choice for hosting static website content, with high availability and low cost. Correct: The combination of Amazon ECS and AWS Fargate can simplify the deployment of containerized applications, eliminating the need to manage underlying EC2 instances and reducing operating costs. Correct: Amazon RDS is the best choice for hosting relational databases, providing automated management capabilities to further simplify operations.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司為其應用程式尋求儲存解決方案。該解決方案必須具有高可用性和可擴展性。此解決方案還必須充當檔案系統，可由 AWS 中和本地的多個 Linux 執行個體透過本機協定安裝，且沒有最小大小要求。該公司建立了一個站點到站點 VPN，用於從其本地網路存取其 VPC。哪種儲存解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company seeks a storage solution for its application. The solution must be highly available and scalable. The solution also must function as a file system be mountable by multiple Linux instances in AWS and on premises through native protocols, and have no minimum size requirements. The company has set up a Site-to-Site VPN for access from its on-premises network to its VPC. Which storage solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon FSx 多重使用區部署
A.en: Amazon FSx Multi-AZ deployments

B.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 多重附加卷
B.en: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach volumes

C.zh: 具有多個掛載目標的 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)
C.en: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with multiple mount targets

D.zh: 具有單一掛載目標和多個存取點的 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)
D.en: Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with a single mount target and multiple access points

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon FSx 是專為 Windows 檔案儲存或 Lustre 檔案儲存設計的服務。雖然支援高可用和多可用區部署，但不支援透過原生協定掛載到多個Linux實例。另外，FSx的使用場景通常有特定的文件儲存需求，該問題需要通用的文件儲存解決方案。錯誤原因：「本機協定掛載」和「多Linux實例支援」不符合問題的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon FSx is a service designed specifically for Windows file storage or Luster file storage. Although it supports high availability and multi-AZ deployment, it does not support mounting to multiple Linux instances through the native protocol. In addition, the usage scenarios of FSx usually have specific file storage requirements, and the problem requires a general file storage solution. Reason for the error: "Native protocol mounting" and "Multiple Linux instance support" do not meet the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EBS Multi-Attach允許多個EC2實例掛載同一個卷，但它是塊存儲，不是文件存儲，無法滿足問題所要求的「文件垃圾郵件」功能。另外，EBS不支援透過原生協定掛載到多個實例，也不支援跨地域存取。錯誤原因：「檔案錯誤」和「交叉註冊存取」不符合問題的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon EBS Multi-Attach allows multiple EC2 instances to mount the same volume, but it is block storage, not file storage, and cannot meet the "file spam" function required by the question. In addition, EBS does not support mounting to multiple instances through native protocols, nor does it support cross-region access. Reason for the error: "File error" and "cross-registration access" that do not meet the requirements of the question.

C.zh: 正確。Amazon EFS 是一種完全託管的檔案儲存服務，支援高可用性和可擴充性，並且可以透過 NFS 等本機協定掛載到多個 Linux 執行個體。透過設定多個掛載目標，EFS可以支援跨多個可用區的訪問，並且可以透過Site-to-Site VPN實現跨可用區訪問。另外，EFS沒有最小大小要求，完全滿足題目要求。問題所要求的所有條件均已完全滿足。
C.en: Correct. Amazon EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports high availability and scalability and can be mounted to multiple Linux instances through native protocols such as NFS. By setting up multiple mount targets, EFS can support access across multiple Availability Zones, and cross-zone access can be achieved through Site-to-Site VPN. In addition, EFS has no minimum size requirement and fully meets the requirements of the question. All conditions required by the question are fully met.

D.zh: 錯誤。儘管 EFS 支援單一掛載目標和多個存取點，但單一掛載目標可能會限制跨多個可用區的高可用性和存取。問題需要「多個掛載目標」來保證高可用性和跨區域存取能力。錯誤原因：「多個掛載目標」不符合問題的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Although EFS supports a single mount target and multiple access points, a single mount target may limit high availability and access across multiple Availability Zones. The question requires "multiple mount targets" to ensure high availability and cross-region access capabilities. Reason for the error: "Multiple mount targets" that do not meet the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: C. 具有多個掛載目標的 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)
answer_text.en: C. Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with multiple mount targets

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon EFS 是一種完全託管的檔案儲存服務，支援高可用性和可擴充性，並且可以透過 NFS 等本機協定掛載到多個 Linux 執行個體。透過設定多個掛載目標，EFS可以支援跨多個可用區的訪問，並且可以透過Site-to-Site VPN實現跨可用區訪問。另外，EFS沒有最小大小要求，完全滿足題目要求。問題所要求的所有條件均已完全滿足。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon EFS is a fully managed file storage service that supports high availability and scalability and can be mounted to multiple Linux instances through native protocols such as NFS. By setting up multiple mount targets, EFS can support access across multiple Availability Zones, and cross-zone access can be achieved through Site-to-Site VPN. In addition, EFS has no minimum size requirement and fully meets the requirements of the question. All conditions required by the question are fully met.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家已有 4 年歷史的媒體公司正在使用 AWS Organizations 所有功能集來組織其 AWS 帳戶。據公司財務團隊稱，會員帳戶的帳單資訊不得被任何人訪問，包括會員帳戶的根用戶。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A 4-year-old media company is using the AWS Organizations all features feature set to organize its AWS accounts. According to the company's finance team, the billing information on the member accounts must not be accessible to anyone, including the root user of the member accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將所有財務團隊使用者新增至 IAM 群組。將名為 Billing 的 AWS 託管策略附加到該群組。
A.en: Add all finance team users to an IAM group. Attach an AWS managed policy named Billing to the group.

B.zh: 附加基於身分的策略以拒絕所有使用者（包括根使用者）存取計費資訊。
B.en: Attach an identity-based policy to deny access to the billing information to all users, including the root user.

C.zh: 建立服務控制策略 (SCP) 以拒絕對計費資訊的存取。將 SCP 附加到根組織單位 (OU)。
C.en: Create a service control policy (SCP) to deny access to the billing information. Attach the SCP to the root organizational unit (OU).

D.zh: 從組織所有功能功能集轉換為組織合併計費功能集。
D.en: Convert from the Organizations all features feature set to the Organizations consolidated billing feature set.

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項僅向財務團隊使用者提供帳單資訊的存取權限，但並不能解決「禁止所有使用者（包括root使用者）存取帳單資訊」的問題。 IAM策略對root使用者的權限沒有任何限制，因為root使用者擁有所有權限。
A.en: Incorrect. this option only provides financial team users with access to billing information, but does not solve the problem of "prohibiting all users (including root users) from accessing billing information." IAM policies have no restrictions on the permissions of the root user because the root user has all permissions.

B.zh: 錯誤。基於身分的政策無限限制 root 使用者的權限。 root使用者的權限直接透過IAM策略進行限制，沒有任何限制。該選項是無條件的，應標記該問題。
B.en: Incorrect. Identity-based Policy unlimitedly limits the permissions of the root user. The root user's permissions are directly restricted through IAM policies without any restrictions. this option is unconditional and the question should be marked.

C.zh: 正確。服務控制政策 (SCP) 是 AWS Organizations 提供的一項功能，可限制組織中所有帳戶（包括根用戶）的權限。透過將 SCP 附加到根組織單位 (OU)，您可以確保所有成員帳戶（包括根使用者）都可以暢通無阻地存取計費資訊。這個選項完全符合問題的要求。
C.en: Correct. Service Control Policy (SCP) is a function provided by AWS Organizations that can limit the permissions of all accounts in the organization, including root users. By attaching the SCP to the root organizational unit (OU), you ensure that all member accounts, including the root user, have unblocked access to billing information. this option completely meets the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。轉換為整合計費功能集會停用 SCP 功能，這是限制 root 使用者存取計費資訊的關鍵。該選項是無條件的，應標記該問題。
D.en: Incorrect. Converting to the Consolidated Billing feature set disables SCP functionality, which is key to restricting root user access to billing information. this option is unconditional and the question should be marked.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立服務控制策略 (SCP) 以拒絕對計費資訊的存取。將 SCP 附加到根組織單位 (OU)。
answer_text.en: C. Create a service control policy (SCP) to deny access to the billing information. Attach the SCP to the root organizational unit (OU).

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：服務控制政策 (SCP) 是 AWS Organizations 提供的一項功能，可限制組織中所有帳戶（包括根用戶）的權限。透過將 SCP 附加到根組織單位 (OU)，您可以確保所有成員帳戶（包括根使用者）都可以暢通無阻地存取計費資訊。這個選項完全符合問題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Service Control Policy (SCP) is a function provided by AWS Organizations that can limit the permissions of all accounts in the organization, including root users. By attaching the SCP to the root organizational unit (OU), you ensure that all member accounts, including the root user, have unblocked access to billing information. this option completely meets the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家電子商務公司在 AWS 雲端中運行與本地倉庫解決方案整合的應用程式。該公司使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 將訂單訊息傳送到本地 HTTPS 終端節點，以便倉庫應用程式可以處理訂單。本地資料中心團隊發現部分訂單訊息未收到。解決方案架構師需要保留未傳遞的訊息並分析這些訊息最多 14 天。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的開發工作滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: An ecommerce company runs an application in the AWS Cloud that is integrated with an on-premises warehouse solution. The company uses Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to send order messages to an on-premises HTTPS endpoint so the warehouse application can process the orders. The local data center team has detected that some of the order messages were not received. A solutions architect needs to retain messages that are not delivered and analyze the messages for up to 14 days. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

A.zh: 配置具有保留期為 14 天的 Amazon Kinesis Data Stream 目標的 Amazon SNS 死信佇列。
A.en: Configure an Amazon SNS dead letter queue that has an Amazon Kinesis Data Stream target with a retention period of 14 days.

B.zh: 在應用程式和 Amazon SNS 之間新增保留期為 14 天的 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列。
B.en: Add an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue with a retention period of 14 days between the application and Amazon SNS.

C.zh: 設定 Amazon SNS 死信佇列，該佇列具有保留期為 14 天的 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 目標。
C.en: Configure an Amazon SNS dead letter queue that has an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) target with a retention period of 14 days.

D.zh: 設定 Amazon SNS 死信佇列，該佇列具有 Amazon DynamoDB 目標，且 TTL 屬性設定為保留期 14 天。
D.en: Configure an Amazon SNS dead letter queue that has an Amazon DynamoDB target with a TTL attribute set for a retention period of 14 days.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 的預設資料保留期為 1 到 7 天。雖然可以延長至 14 天，但這需要額外的配置和成本，而 Kinesis Data Streams 不是 SNS 死信隊列的直接支援目標。
A.en: Incorrect. The default data retention period for Amazon Kinesis Data Streams is 1 to 7 days. Although it can be extended to 14 days, this requires additional configuration and cost, and Kinesis Data Streams is not a direct support target for SNS dead letter queues.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項建議在SNS和應用程式之間新增SQS佇列，但這改變了現有架構的淘汰流邏輯，增加了開發複雜度，不符合「最小開發工作量」的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. This option recommends adding an SQS queue between SNS and the application, but this changes the elimination flow logic of the existing architecture, increases development complexity, and does not meet the "minimum development effort" requirement.

C.zh: 正確。Amazon SNS 支援將未成功傳送的訊息作為死信佇列傳送到 SQS。 SQS可以將訊息保留期配置為14天，完全滿足問題要求，且開發工作量最小。
C.en: Correct. Amazon SNS supports sending unsuccessfully delivered messages to SQS as a dead letter queue. SQS can configure the message retention period to 14 days, which fully meets the question requirements and requires minimal development workload.

D.zh: 錯誤。雖然 DynamoDB 可以透過 TTL 屬性設定資料過期時間，但它並不是 SNS 死信佇列的直接支援目標。需要額外的開發工作來實施消除儲存和分析。
D.en: Incorrect. Although DynamoDB can set the data expiration time through the TTL attribute, it is not a direct support target for SNS dead letter queues. Additional development work is required to implement elimination storage and analysis.

answer_text.zh: C. 設定 Amazon SNS 死信佇列，該佇列具有保留期為 14 天的 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 目標。
answer_text.en: C. Configure an Amazon SNS dead letter queue that has an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) target with a retention period of 14 days.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (80%)； B (20%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon SNS 支援將未成功傳送的訊息作為死信佇列傳送到 SQS。 SQS可以將訊息保留期配置為14天，完全滿足問題要求，且開發工作量最小。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (80%); B (20%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon SNS supports sending unsuccessfully delivered messages to SQS as a dead letter queue. SQS can configure the message retention period to 14 days, which fully meets the question requirements and requires minimal development workload.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家遊戲公司使用 Amazon DynamoDB 來儲存使用者資訊，例如地理位置、玩家資料和排行榜。該公司需要使用最少的編碼來配置 Amazon S3 儲存桶的連續備份。備份不得影響應用程式的可用性，也不得影響為表定義的讀取容量單位 (RCU)。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A gaming company uses Amazon DynamoDB to store user information such as geographic location, player data, and leaderboards. The company needs to configure continuous backups to an Amazon S3 bucket with a minimal amount of coding. The backups must not affect availability of the application and must not affect the read capacity units (RCUs) that are defined for the table. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 Amazon EMR 叢集。建立 Apache Hive 作業以將資料備份到 Amazon S3。
A.en: Use an Amazon EMR cluster. Create an Apache Hive job to back up the data to Amazon S3.

B.zh: 透過連續備份將資料直接從 DynamoDB 匯出到 Amazon S3。開啟表的時間點恢復。
B.en: Export the data directly from DynamoDB to Amazon S3 with continuous backups. Turn on point-in-time recovery for the table.

C.zh: 設定 Amazon DynamoDB 流。建立 AWS Lambda 函數來使用串流並將資料匯出到 Amazon S3 儲存桶。
C.en: Configure Amazon DynamoDB Streams. Create an AWS Lambda function to consume the stream and export the data to an Amazon S3 bucket.

D.zh: 建立 AWS Lambda 函數以定期將資料從資料庫表格匯出到 Amazon S3。開啟表的時間點恢復。
D.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to export the data from the database tables to Amazon S3 on a regular basis. Turn on point-in-time recovery for the table.

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項錯誤：使用 Amazon EMR 和 Apache Hive 需要額外的複雜性和大量的編碼工作，並且不符合「最低編碼」要求。錯誤：由於需要讀取大量數據，此方法可能會影響 DynamoDB 效能。
A.en: Incorrect. Use an Amazon EMR cluster. Create an Apache Hive job to back up data to Amazon S3. Error: Using Amazon EMR and Apache Hive requires additional complexity and significant coding effort and does not meet the "minimum coding" requirement. Error: This approach may impact DynamoDB performance because of the large amount of data that needs to be read.

B.zh: 正確。將資料直接從 DynamoDB 匯出到 Amazon S3 並啟用連續備份。為表啟用時間點恢復。正確：DynamoDB 支援直接匯出到 Amazon S3，啟用時間點復原可進行連續備份。正確：此方法不會影響應用程式可用性或 RCU，因為導出操作是非同步的。
B.en: Correct. Export data directly from DynamoDB to Amazon S3 and enable continuous backups. Enable point-in-time recovery for the table. Correct: DynamoDB supports direct export to Amazon S3, and enabling point-in-time recovery enables continuous backup. Correct: This method does not impact application availability nor RCU because the export operation is asynchronous.

C.zh: 錯誤。DynamoDB Streams 主要用於即時資料處理，而不是備份。這種方法需要額外的開發工作，並且不符合「最少編碼」的要求。錯誤：使用 Lambda 函數處理流程可能會影響應用程式的效能和 RCU，因為串流會消耗額外的資源。
C.en: Incorrect. DynamoDB Streams are primarily intended for real-time data processing, not backup. This approach requires additional development work and does not meet the "minimal coding" requirement. Error: Using Lambda functions to process streams may impact your application's performance and RCU because streams consume additional resources.

D.zh: 錯誤。建立一個 AWS Lambda 函數，定期將資料從資料庫表格匯出到 Amazon S3。為表啟用時間點恢復。錯誤：定期導出資料需要額外的開發工作，且不符合「最低編碼」要求。錯誤：此方法可能會影響 DynamoDB 效能，因為需要定期讀取大量資料。
D.en: Incorrect. Create an AWS Lambda function that periodically exports data from a database table to Amazon S3. Enable point-in-time recovery for the table. Error: Regularly exporting data requires additional development work and does not meet the "minimum coding" requirement. Error: This method may impact DynamoDB performance because large amounts of data need to be read regularly.

answer_text.zh: B. 透過連續備份將資料直接從 DynamoDB 匯出到 Amazon S3。開啟表的時間點恢復。
answer_text.en: B. Export the data directly from DynamoDB to Amazon S3 with continuous backups. Turn on point-in-time recovery for the table.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (89%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：將資料直接從 DynamoDB 匯出到 Amazon S3 並啟用連續備份。為表啟用時間點恢復。正確：DynamoDB 支援直接匯出到 Amazon S3，啟用時間點復原可進行連續備份。正確：此方法不會影響應用程式可用性或 RCU，因為導出操作是非同步的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (89%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Export data directly from DynamoDB to Amazon S3 and enable continuous backups. Enable point-in-time recovery for the table. Correct: DynamoDB supports direct export to Amazon S3, and enabling point-in-time recovery enables continuous backup. Correct: This method does not impact application availability nor RCU because the export operation is asynchronous.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師正在設計一個非同步應用程式來處理銀行的信用卡資料驗證請求。應用程式必須是安全的並且能夠至少處理每個請求一次。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect is designing an asynchronous application to process credit card data validation requests for a bank. The application must be secure and be able to process each request at least once. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 事件來源對應。將 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 標準佇列設定為事件來源。使用 AWS Key Management Service (SSE-KMS) 進行加密。為 Lambda 執行角色新增 kms:Decrypt 權限。
A.en: Use AWS Lambda event source mapping. Set Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queues as the event source. Use AWS Key Management Service (SSE-KMS) for encryption. Add the kms:Decrypt permission for the Lambda execution role.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 事件來源對應。使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 佇列作為事件來源。使用 SQS 託管加密金鑰 (SSE-SQS) 進行加密。新增Lambda函數的加密金鑰呼叫權限。
B.en: Use AWS Lambda event source mapping. Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queues as the event source. Use SQS managed encryption keys (SSE-SQS) for encryption. Add the encryption key invocation permission for the Lambda function.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 事件來源對應。將 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 佇列設定為事件來源。使用 AWS KMS 金鑰 (SSE-KMS)。為 Lambda 執行角色新增 kms:Decrypt 權限。
C.en: Use the AWS Lambda event source mapping. Set Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queues as the event source. Use AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS). Add the kms:Decrypt permission for the Lambda execution role.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 事件來源對應。將 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 標準佇列設定為事件來源。使用 AWS KMS 金鑰 (SSE-KMS) 進行加密。新增Lambda函數的加密金鑰呼叫權限。
D.en: Use the AWS Lambda event source mapping. Set Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queues as the event source. Use AWS KMS keys (SSE-KMS) for encryption. Add the encryption key invocation permission for the Lambda function.

A.zh: 正確。SQS標準佇列支援「至少一次」訊息處理，滿足問題的要求。正確：使用SSE-KMS加密可以確保資料安全，需要為Lambda執行角色添加kms:Decrypt權限。成本更低：標準隊列比先進先出隊列便宜，適合對成本敏感的場景。
A.en: Correct. SQS standard queue supports "at least once" message processing, which meets the requirements of the question. Correct: Using SSE-KMS encryption can ensure data security, and you need to add kms:Decrypt permission to the Lambda execution role. Lower cost: Standard queues are cheaper than FIFO queues and are suitable for cost-sensitive scenarios.

B.zh: 錯誤。FIFO佇列支援「恰好一次」訊息處理，但題目要求「至少一次」，所以不符合要求。正確：SSE-SQS是SQS託管的加密機制，適合加密需求。成本較高： FIFO 隊列的成本高於標準隊列，且不是最具成本效益的選擇。
B.en: Incorrect. FIFO queue supports "exactly once" message processing, but the question requires "at least once", so it does not meet the requirements. Correct: SSE-SQS is an encryption mechanism hosted by SQS and is suitable for encryption needs. Higher cost: FIFO queues cost more than standard queues and are not the most cost-effective option.

C.zh: 錯誤。FIFO佇列支援「恰好一次」訊息處理，但題目要求「至少一次」，所以不符合要求。正確：使用SSE-KMS加密可以確保資料安全，需要為Lambda執行角色添加kms:Decrypt權限。成本較高： FIFO 隊列的成本高於標準隊列，且不是最具成本效益的選擇。
C.en: Incorrect. FIFO queue supports "exactly once" message processing, but the question requires "at least once", so it does not meet the requirements. Correct: Using SSE-KMS encryption can ensure data security, and you need to add kms:Decrypt permission to the Lambda execution role. Higher cost: FIFO queues cost more than standard queues and are not the most cost-effective option.

D.zh: 錯誤。SQS標準佇列支援「至少一次」訊息處理，滿足問題的要求。錯誤：加密權限描述不準確。應該是為Lambda執行角色添加kms:Decrypt權限，而不是「加密金鑰呼叫權限」。
D.en: Incorrect. SQS standard queue supports "at least once" message processing, which meets the requirements of the question. Error: The encryption permission description is inaccurate. It should be to add kms:Decrypt permission to the Lambda execution role instead of "encryption key calling permission".

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Lambda 事件來源對應。將 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 標準佇列設定為事件來源。使用 AWS Key Management Service (SSE-KMS) 進行加密。為 Lambda 執行角色新增 kms:Decrypt 權限。
answer_text.en: A. Use AWS Lambda event source mapping. Set Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) standard queues as the event source. Use AWS Key Management Service (SSE-KMS) for encryption. Add the kms:Decrypt permission for the Lambda execution role.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (77%)； B (21%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：SQS標準佇列支援「至少一次」訊息處理，滿足問題的要求。正確：使用SSE-KMS加密可以確保資料安全，需要為Lambda執行角色添加kms:Decrypt權限。成本更低：標準隊列比先進先出隊列便宜，適合對成本敏感的場景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (77%); B (21%). Popular discussion and key point summary: SQS standard queue supports "at least once" message processing, which meets the requirements of the question. Correct: Using SSE-KMS encryption can ensure data security, and you need to add kms:Decrypt permission to the Lambda execution role. Lower cost: Standard queues are cheaper than FIFO queues and are suitable for cost-sensitive scenarios.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有多個用於開發工作的 AWS 帳戶。一些員工持續使用超大的 Amazon EC2 實例，這導致公司超出了開發帳戶的年度預算。該公司希望集中限制這些帳戶中 AWS 資源的建立。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的開發工作滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has multiple AWS accounts for development work. Some staff consistently use oversized Amazon EC2 instances, which causes the company to exceed the yearly budget for the development accounts. The company wants to centrally restrict the creation of AWS resources in these accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

A.zh: 開發使用經批准的 EC2 建立流程的 AWS Systems Manager 範本。使用核准的 Systems Manager 範本來預置 EC2 執行個體。
A.en: Develop AWS Systems Manager templates that use an approved EC2 creation process. Use the approved Systems Manager templates to provision EC2 instances.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Organizations 將帳戶組織到組織單位 (OU)。定義並附加服務控制策略 (SCP) 以控制 EC2 執行個體類型的使用。
B.en: Use AWS Organizations to organize the accounts into organizational units (OUs). Define and attach a service control policy (SCP) to control the usage of EC2 instance types.

C.zh: 設定 Amazon EventBridge 規則，以便在建立 EC2 執行個體時呼叫 AWS Lambda 函數。停止不允許的 EC2 執行個體類型。
C.en: Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule that invokes an AWS Lambda function when an EC2 instance is created. Stop disallowed EC2 instance types.

D.zh: 為員工設定 AWS Service Catalog 產品以建立允許的 EC2 執行個體類型。確保員工只能使用服務目錄產品來部署 EC2 執行個體。
D.en: Set up AWS Service Catalog products for the staff to create the allowed EC2 instance types. Ensure that staff can deploy EC2 instances only by using the Service Catalog products.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用核准的 EC2 建立流程開發 AWS Systems Manager 範本。錯誤：雖然 Systems Manager 可以幫助標準化流程，但它需要額外的開發工作來建立和維護模板，並且不會直接限制使用者建立不符合要求的 EC2 執行個體。開發成本高，不符合「最小開發工作量」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Develop AWS Systems Manager templates using approved EC2 creation processes. Error: While Systems Manager can help standardize processes, it requires additional development work to create and maintain templates and does not directly restrict users from creating EC2 instances that do not meet requirements. Development costs are high and do not meet the "minimum development effort" requirement.

B.zh: 正確。此選項正確：AWS Organizations 和 SCP 是專門為集中管理和限制資源使用而設計的工具。 SCP可以直接限制使用者建立不符合要求的EC2實例類型。開發成本低，滿足「最小開發工作量」要求。
B.en: Correct. Use AWS Organizations to organize accounts into organizational units (OUs). Define and attach a Service Control Policy (SCP) to control the use of EC2 instance types. Correct: AWS Organizations and SCP are tools specifically designed to centrally manage and limit resource usage. SCP can directly restrict users from creating EC2 instance types that do not meet the requirements. Development costs are low and meet the "minimum development effort" requirement.

C.zh: 錯誤。設定 Amazon EventBridge 規則以在建立 EC2 執行個體時觸發 AWS Lambda 函數。停止不允許的 EC2 執行個體類型。 Bug：雖然可以透過 EventBridge 和 Lambda 實現資源限制，但這種方法是反應性的（事後處理），並且需要額外的開發工作來編寫和維護 Lambda 函數。開發成本高，不符合「最小開發工作量」的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Configure an Amazon EventBridge rule to trigger an AWS Lambda function when an EC2 instance is created. Stop disallowed EC2 instance types. Bug: Although resource limiting can be achieved through EventBridge and Lambda, this approach is reactive (processed after the fact) and requires additional development work to write and maintain Lambda functions. Development costs are high and do not meet the "minimum development effort" requirement.

D.zh: 錯誤。為員工設定 AWS Service Catalog 產品以建立允許的 EC2 執行個體類型。錯誤：AWS Service Catalog 可以幫助標準化資源創建，但需要額外的配置工作，並且不能完全阻止使用者直接創建不合規的 EC2 執行個體。開發成本高，不符合「最小開發工作量」的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Set up AWS Service Catalog products for employees to create allowed EC2 instance types. Error: AWS Service Catalog can help standardize resource creation, but it requires additional configuration work and does not completely prevent users from directly creating non-compliant EC2 instances. Development costs are high and do not meet the "minimum development effort" requirement.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS Organizations 將帳戶組織到組織單位 (OU)。定義並附加服務控制策略 (SCP) 以控制 EC2 執行個體類型的使用。
answer_text.en: B. Use AWS Organizations to organize the accounts into organizational units (OUs). Define and attach a service control policy (SCP) to control the usage of EC2 instance types.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (93%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項正確：AWS Organizations 和 SCP 是專門為集中管理和限制資源使用而設計的工具。 SCP可以直接限制使用者建立不符合要求的EC2實例類型。開發成本低，滿足「最小開發工作量」要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (93%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use AWS Organizations to organize accounts into organizational units (OUs). Define and attach a Service Control Policy (SCP) to control the use of EC2 instance types. Correct: AWS Organizations and SCP are tools specifically designed to centrally manage and limit resource usage. SCP can directly restrict users from creating EC2 instance types that do not meet the requirements. Development costs are low and meet the "minimum development effort" requirement.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望使用人工智慧 (AI) 來確定其客戶服務呼叫的品質。該公司目前管理四種不同語言的通話，其中包括英語。該公司未來將提供新的語言。該公司沒有資源來定期維護機器學習 (ML) 模型。該公司需要根據客戶服務通話錄音建立書面情緒分析報告。客戶服務通話錄音文字必須翻譯成英文。哪一種步驟組合可以滿足這些要求？ （選擇三項。）
question_text.en: A company wants to use artificial intelligence (AI) to determine the quality of its customer service calls. The company currently manages calls in four different languages, including English. The company will offer new languages in the future. The company does not have the resources to regularly maintain machine learning (ML) models. The company needs to create written sentiment analysis reports from the customer service call recordings. The customer service call recording text must be translated into English. Which combination of steps will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

A.zh: 使用 Amazon Comprehend 將錄音翻譯成英文。
A.en: Use Amazon Comprehend to translate the audio recordings into English.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon Lex 建立書面情緒分析報告。
B.en: Use Amazon Lex to create the written sentiment analysis reports.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Polly 將錄音轉換為文字。
C.en: Use Amazon Polly to convert the audio recordings into text.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon Transcribe 將任何語言的錄音轉換為文字。
D.en: Use Amazon Transcribe to convert the audio recordings in any language into text.

E.zh: 使用 Amazon Translate 將任何語言的文字翻譯為英文。
E.en: Use Amazon Translate to translate text in any language to English.

F.zh: 使用 Amazon Comprehend 建立情緒分析報告。
F.en: Use Amazon Comprehend to create the sentiment analysis reports.

A.zh: 錯誤。。 Amazon Comprehend的功能是執行自然語言處理（NLP），包括情緒分析、實體識別等，但它無法翻譯音訊或文字。
A.en: Incorrect. . Amazon Comprehend's function is to perform natural language processing (NLP), including sentiment analysis, entity recognition, etc., but it cannot translate audio or text.

B.zh: 錯誤。。 Amazon Lex是用於建立會話餃子的服務（例如Gantian Robot），它不適合產生情緒分析報告。
B.en: Incorrect. . Amazon Lex is a service used to build conversational dumplings (such as Gantian Robot), and it is not suitable for generating sentiment analysis reports.

C.zh: 錯誤。。 Amazon Polly 將文字轉換為語音，而不是將音訊轉換為文字。
C.en: Incorrect. . Amazon Polly converts text to speech, not audio to text.

D.zh: 正確。。 Amazon Transcribe 可以將錄音轉換為文本，支援多種語言。
D.en: Correct. . Amazon Transcribe can convert audio recordings into text, supporting multiple languages.

E.zh: 正確。。 Amazon Translate 可以將文字從一種語言翻譯成另一種語言，包括英文。
E.en: Correct. . Amazon Translate can translate text from one language to another, including into English.

F.zh: 正確。。 Amazon Comprehend 可以對文字執行情緒分析並產生邊界報告。
F.en: Correct. . Amazon Comprehend can perform sentiment analysis on text and generate boundary reports.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 Amazon Transcribe 將任何語言的錄音轉換為文字。；E. 使用 Amazon Translate 將任何語言的文字翻譯為英文。；F. 使用 Amazon Comprehend 建立情緒分析報告。
answer_text.en: D. Use Amazon Transcribe to convert the audio recordings in any language into text.; E. Use Amazon Translate to translate text in any language to English.; F. Use Amazon Comprehend to create the sentiment analysis reports.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：DEF (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：。 Amazon Transcribe 可以將錄音轉換為文本，支援多種語言。；。 Amazon Translate 可以將文字從一種語言翻譯成另一種語言，包括英文。；。 Amazon Comprehend 可以對文字執行情緒分析並產生邊界報告。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: DEF (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: . Amazon Transcribe can convert audio recordings into text, supporting multiple languages.; . Amazon Translate can translate text from one language to another, including into English.; . Amazon Comprehend can perform sentiment analysis on text and generate boundary reports.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體來託管其內部系統。作為部署作業的一部分，管理員嘗試使用 AWS CLI 終止 EC2 執行個體。但是，管理員收到 403（訪問被拒絕）錯誤訊息。管理者正在使用附加了以下 IAM 策略的 IAM 角色：請求失敗的原因是什麼？
question_text.en: A company uses Amazon EC2 instances to host its internal systems. As part of a deployment operation, an administrator tries to use the AWS CLI to terminate an EC2 instance. However, the administrator receives a 403 (Access Denied) error message. The administrator is using an IAM role that has the following IAM policy attached: What is the cause of the unsuccessful request?

A.zh: EC2 執行個體具有具有 Deny 語句的基於資源的策略。
A.en: The EC2 instance has a resource-based policy with a Deny statement.

B.zh: 政策聲明中尚未指定主體。
B.en: The principal has not been specified in the policy statement.

C.zh: 「操作」欄位不授予終止 EC2 執行個體所需的操作。
C.en: The "Action" field does not grant the actions that are required to terminate the EC2 instance.

D.zh: 終止 EC2 執行個體的請求並非源自 CIDR 區塊 192.0.2.0/24 或 203.0.113.0/24。
D.en: The request to terminate the EC2 instance does not originate from the CIDR blocks 192.0.2.0/24 or 203.0.113.0/24.

A.zh: 錯誤。該問題並未提到 EC2 執行個體有任何基於資源的策略。 IAM 策略是特定於使用者或角色，而非資源本身。
A.en: Incorrect. The question does not mention that EC2 instances have any resource-based policy. IAM policies are specific to users or roles, not the resources themselves.

B.zh: 錯誤。IAM 策略不需要明確委託人 (Principal)，因為它已附加到 IAM 角色。這個問題明確指出管理員正在使用 IAM 角色，因為主題已經隱含在該角色中。
B.en: Incorrect. IAM policies do not require an explicit principal (Principal) because it is already attached to the IAM role. The question clearly states that the administrator is using an IAM role, because the subject is already implicit in the role.

C.zh: 錯誤。IAM 策略明確允許「ec2:TerminateInstances」操作。問題的根本原因不是「Action」桶，而是限制操作執行的「Deny」條件。
C.en: Incorrect. The "ec2:TerminateInstances" operation is explicitly allowed in the IAM policy. The root cause of the problem is not the "Action" bucket, but the "Deny" condition that limits the execution of the operation.

D.zh: 正確。IAM策略中的「拒絕」語句包含條件（Condition），需要檢查的來源IP必須在指定的網段範圍內。如果請求的來源IP不在這些範圍內，「Deny」語句就會生效，導致存取被拒絕。
D.en: Correct. The "Deny" statement in the IAM policy contains a condition (Condition), and the source IP to be checked must be within the specified CIDR block range. If the source IP of the request is not within these ranges, the "Deny" statement will take effect, causing access to be denied.

answer_text.zh: D. 終止 EC2 執行個體的請求並非源自 CIDR 區塊 192.0.2.0/24 或 203.0.113.0/24。
answer_text.en: D. The request to terminate the EC2 instance does not originate from the CIDR blocks 192.0.2.0/24 or 203.0.113.0/24.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：IAM策略中的「拒絕」語句包含條件（Condition），需要檢查的來源IP必須在指定的網段範圍內。如果請求的來源IP不在這些範圍內，「Deny」語句就會生效，導致存取被拒絕。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The "Deny" statement in the IAM policy contains a condition (Condition), and the source IP to be checked must be within the specified CIDR block range. If the source IP of the request is not within these ranges, the "Deny" statement will take effect, causing access to be denied.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在進行內部稽核。該公司希望確保與該公司的 AWS Lake Formation 資料湖關聯的 Amazon S3 儲存桶中的資料不包含敏感的客戶或員工資料。該公司希望發現個人識別資訊 (PII) 或財務信息，包括護照號碼和信用卡號碼。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is conducting an internal audit. The company wants to ensure that the data in an Amazon S3 bucket that is associated with the company’s AWS Lake Formation data lake does not contain sensitive customer or employee data. The company wants to discover personally identifiable information (PII) or financial information, including passport numbers and credit card numbers. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在帳戶上設定 AWS Audit Manager。選擇支付卡產業資料安全標準 (PCI DSS) 進行審核。
A.en: Configure AWS Audit Manager on the account. Select the Payment Card Industry Data Security Standards (PCI DSS) for auditing.

B.zh: 在 S3 儲存桶上設定 Amazon S3 清單 設定 Amazon Athena 以查詢清單。
B.en: Configure Amazon S3 Inventory on the S3 bucket Configure Amazon Athena to query the inventory.

C.zh: 設定 Amazon Macie 以執行使用所需資料類型的託管識別碼的資料發現作業。
C.en: Configure Amazon Macie to run a data discovery job that uses managed identifiers for the required data types.

D.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 Select 在 S3 儲存桶中執行報告。
D.en: Use Amazon S3 Select to run a report across the S3 bucket.

A.zh: 錯誤。設定 AWS Audit Manager。選擇支付卡產業資料安全標準 (PCI DSS) 進行審核。錯誤：AWS Audit Manager 主要用於幫助企業評估和審核其合規性（例如 PCI DSS），但它不具備直接掃描 S3 儲存桶中的資料以發現敏感資訊的能力。
A.en: Incorrect. Configure AWS Audit Manager. Select Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard (PCI DSS) for auditing. Error: AWS Audit Manager is mainly used to help enterprises assess and audit their compliance (such as PCI DSS), but it does not have the ability to directly scan data in S3 buckets to discover sensitive information.

B.zh: 錯誤。設定 Amazon S3 清單。配置 Amazon Athena 查詢清單。錯誤：Amazon S3 Inventory 提供有關 S3 儲存桶中物件的元資料報告，但無法識別 PII 或財務資訊等敏感資料。 Amazon Athena 可以查詢這些庫存，但仍然無法直接發現敏感資訊。
B.en: Incorrect. Configure Amazon S3 Inventory. Configure an Amazon Athena query manifest. Error: Amazon S3 Inventory provides metadata reports about objects in S3 buckets, but it cannot identify sensitive data such as PII or financial information. Amazon Athena can query these inventories, but it still cannot directly discover sensitive information.

C.zh: 正確。設定 Amazon Macie 以執行資料發現作業，該作業使用託管識別碼來識別所需的資料類型。正確：Amazon Macie 是一項專門為發現和保護敏感資料而設計的服務。它可以掃描 S3 儲存桶中的資料並使用託管識別碼來識別 PII 和財務資訊（例如護照號碼和信用卡號碼）。
C.en: Correct. Configure Amazon Macie to run a data discovery job that uses managed identifiers to identify the required data types. Correct: Amazon Macie is a service specifically designed to discover and protect sensitive data. It can scan data in S3 buckets and use managed identifiers to identify PII and financial information (such as passport numbers and credit card numbers).

D.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon S3 Select 在 S3 儲存桶上執行報告。錯誤：Amazon S3 Select 用於從 S3 物件中提取特定數據，但它無法自動識別敏感資訊或運行數據發現作業。
D.en: Incorrect. Use Amazon S3 Select to run reports on an S3 bucket. Error: Amazon S3 Select is used to extract specific data from S3 objects, but it cannot automatically identify sensitive information or run data discovery jobs.

answer_text.zh: C. 設定 Amazon Macie 以執行使用所需資料類型的託管識別碼的資料發現作業。
answer_text.en: C. Configure Amazon Macie to run a data discovery job that uses managed identifiers for the required data types.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：設定 Amazon Macie 以執行資料發現作業，該作業使用託管識別碼來識別所需的資料類型。正確：Amazon Macie 是一項專門為發現和保護敏感資料而設計的服務。它可以掃描 S3 儲存桶中的資料並使用託管識別碼來識別 PII 和財務資訊（例如護照號碼和信用卡號碼）。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Configure Amazon Macie to run a data discovery job that uses managed identifiers to identify the required data types. Correct: Amazon Macie is a service specifically designed to discover and protect sensitive data. It can scan data in S3 buckets and use managed identifiers to identify PII and financial information (such as passport numbers and credit card numbers).
